title: Calibrated uncertainty for drug repurposing via conformal prediction on the Open Targets knowledge graph — replication code
description: Replication code and analysis outputs for the first application of conformal prediction to knowledge-graph-based drug repurposing. Includes XGBoost and GraphSAGE models, marginal and Mondrian conformal prediction calibration, feature ablation, and case study analyses on 6.4 million drug-disease pairs from the Open Targets Platform release 26.03.
